content_body:
My family and I normally vacation in Florida, so when my father chose this cabin in Blue Ridge, I have to admit I was skeptical. I have to say that this has been the most relaxing and carefree place that we have probably ever been to. The creek is so beautiful and a nice place to relax and unwind. We all spent a good deal of time near it, either fishing or just splashing around. There is just so much to do! We all absolutely loved this place and will recommend it to all to our family. Hope to come here again very soon.
GA
title: Relaxing In The North Georgia Mountains
